/usr/bin/ar qc libvg.a CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_image.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_palette.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_pointer.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_svg.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/bucketalloc.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/dict.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/geom.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/priorityq.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/sweep.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/third_party/libtess2/Source/tess.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_text_fx.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_text_layout.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/vg_ui_ext.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/backends/vulkan/vg_vk.c.o CMakeFiles/vg.dir/src/fx/vg_fx.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvg.a
